# Lsc

**Summary**: A technique used to measure the activity of low-energy beta emitters.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-ahmed-2|Ahmed, 2019]] used LSC to determine tritium concentrations in groundwater samples.

## Key Results and Findings

- Samples WB03 and WB08 showed higher tritium (0.98 TU and 0.82 TU) indicating recent infiltration. ([[2019-ahmed-2|Ahmed, 2019, p. 59]])
